Full Stack Engineer at Theta Technologies

Vue.js

linkedin.com/in/pablo-ramirez-dev

Summary
Full-stack engineer with focus on frontend architecture and cloud infrastructure.

Experience at Theta includes leading the migration to micro-frontends and
introducing contract testing between services.

Prior to Theta, worked at Iota building the checkout experience for an
e-commerce platform that served 2M MAU.
